input: multimodal graphs (social + visual + textual features) with evolving structure and tasks
output: predictions for new tasks while retaining performance on old tasks
backbone: Adaptive Multimodal Graph Neural Network (AdaMGNN) with neural architecture search
loss: joint optimization of NAS and group sparse regularization (GSR) across tasks
key_idea: jointly optimize neural architecture search and group sparse regularization to adapt to new tasks while preserving old knowledge
datasets: two real-world multimodal continual graph scenarios (not named in abstract)
